tag-top-to-cross-icon-large.deprecated_comment: Use semantic token base-padding-horizontal-large instead. Edge cases should be ok for edge usage. In principle, it's still padding. In reality, it's vertical not horizontal. But that may be ok

tag-top-to-cross-icon-medium.deprecated_comment: Use semantic token base-padding-horizontal-medium instead. Edge cases should be ok for edge usage. In principle, it's still padding. In reality, it's vertical not horizontal. But that may be ok

tree-view-bottom-to-label.deprecated_comment: Use semantic token base-padding-vertical-medium instead. Faulty measurement. Combination of two measurements Correcting to text to inner element spacing. Refactor needed

tree-view-edge-to-checkbox.deprecated_comment: Use semantic token list-item-padding-horizontal instead. Refactor or combine list-item-padding-horizontal with base-padding-horizontal-medium

tree-view-header-to-item.deprecated_comment: Should be zero. Zero values are removed without token replacements; hardcode a zero-pixel value in implementation.

tree-view-item-to-header.deprecated_comment: Use semantic token list-gap-regular instead. This gap is not used in design; the header gap is equal to all other list item gaps. Refactor may be necessary

tree-view-item-to-item.deprecated_comment: This token has been deprecated, use tree-view-item-to-item-default instead.

tree-view-top-to-disclosure-indicator.deprecated_comment: Use semantic token list-item-padding-vertical-regular instead. Design spec's show different value/measurement than token value

tree-view-top-to-drag-handle.deprecated_comment: Use semantic token base-padding-vertical-medium instead. Drag handle will need to be in a frame with height equal to workflow-icon-size-[size]
